channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump signs order to create US sovereign wealth fund, eyeing TikTok purchase
item.description: President Trump on Monday directed secretaries to begin a process to create an American sovereign wealth fund, suggesting it could partially own the popular app TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Email Security Threats on the Rise: VIPRE's Latest Report Reveals Staggering Statistics
item.description: VIPRE's email threat analysis reveals 90% of emails sent are classified as spam, with the US topping the list. Rising threats include QR code phishing and adoption of deepfakes.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Ontario premier says he's 'ripping up' contract with Musk's Starlink in response to US tariffs
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The leader of Canada’s most populous province of Ontario said Monday that he’s ripping up a contract with Elon Musk’s Starlink internet service in response to U.S. President Donald Trump’s sweeping tariffs on Canada.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Book Review: Chris Hayes' 'Sirens' Call' is a thorough look at the fight for attention in modern age
item.description: MSNBC Host Chris Hayes explores the evolution of the attention economy in “The Sirens' Call: How Attention Became the World's Most Endangered Resource.”.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Demillo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: DR Congo Sees Surge in VPN Sign-ups Amid TikTok and X App Restrictions
item.description: People across the Democratic Republic of Congo have turned to VPN services en masse as access to TikTok and X apps has been restricted, with Proton VPN recording a 7000% spike in sign-ups above baseline.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: 25 enterprise tech predictions and goals for 2025, from APAC CIOs
item.description: As enterprises across Southeast Asia and Hong Kong undergo rapid digitalisation, democratisation of artificial intelligence (AI) and evolving cloud strategies are reshaping how they operate.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bill Gates shares his thoughts on vaccine backlash, Intel's woes and Google's antitrust battle
item.description: Although Microsoft founder Bill Gates sat down for an interview with The Associated Press to discuss his new memoir, “Source Code: My Beginnings,” he also shared his views on a variety of other topics, including vaccine conspiracy views about him, his thoughts on the struggles of longtime computer c
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Gemini can now use Python code to create charts about your Google Sheets data
item.description: Gemini in Sheets will help you understand, analyze, and visualize your data - but there is a slight catch.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The OnePlus Open 2 rumored to get a camera upgrade even the Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra doesn't have
item.description: The latest rumor around the OnePlus Open 2 is that it'll get macro support on the telephoto camera for more versatility.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Family of OpenAI whistleblower Suchir Balaji files lawsuit seeking San Francisco police records
item.description: Balaji garnered national attention in October when he went public with accusations that his former employer, OpenAI, was flouting federal copyright laws with its blockbuster chatbot, ChatGPT.
item.dc:creator: Jakob Rodgers, The Mercury News

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: JavaScript Temporal to ease dates and times
item.description: Web developers will soon find it easier to work with dates and times in JavaScript, thanks to emerging browser support for JavaScript’s Temporal object, according to Mozilla.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: TypeScript checks returns for conditional and indexed access types
item.description: Microsoft has moved TypeScript 5.8 into the beta stage. The new release of the company’s typed superset of JavaScript introduces a limited form of type checking against conditional types in return statements. The TypeScript 5.8 beta was introduced January 29.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 4 tiny Docker images for lightweight containers
item.description: Docker images can get pretty bulky if you’re not careful. Your typical Docker image includes everything you need to run a particular piece of software (such as the application language’s runtime) and everything those things depend on.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Now US government agencies can use OpenAI’s ChatGPT too
item.description: Everyone wants to get their hands on AI tools, and employees in government agencies are no exception. Still, stakes are far higher for governments when it comes to security, privacy, and protecting the public.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: UK regulator may investigate AWS and Microsoft cloud businesses
item.description: AWS and Microsoft could potentially face an investigation of their cloud businesses in Britain should the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) follow the recommendation of an independent inquiry group that reports into the UK’s antitrust regulator.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Federal employee lawsuit alleges security, privacy risks in new OPM communications system
item.description: The plaintiffs claim OPM violated the E-Government Act by not releasing details of how the email system will manage federal employees’ personal information. The post Federal employee lawsuit alleges security, privacy risks in new OPM communications system first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network
